## Meeting Purpose

[Onboarding catch-up between new hire Will Ruzvidzo and experienced team member Aida Knežević to discuss GrowthX.ai's structure, processes, and tips for success.](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai's rapid growth: 18 people in Dec '22 → Series A → expanded team structure (MDs, MEs, CMs)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Strategy Sprint team: 8-week client onboarding, blog strategy creation, 10-15 initial posts](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [ME role: 60% editing, also strategy input, client management, process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Success factors: proactive problem-solving, high standards, client relationship building](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Company Evolution and Structure

  - [Dec '22: 18 people, first MEs hired to improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Post-Series A: Added Managing Directors (MDs) for strategic leadership](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current structure: Strategy Sprint team (8-week onboarding) → Execution teams (ongoing content delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Roles: Managing Directors (MDs), Managing Editors (MEs), Content Managers (CMs)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Strategy Sprint Process

  - [8-week client onboarding period](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Develop blog content strategy (typically topic cluster approach)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Create 10-15 initial blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Calibrate voice, tone, and setup](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Client decides to continue or not; GrowthX.ai also evaluates fit](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Managing Editor Responsibilities

  - [Editing (≈60% of workload)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Collaborate on strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Keyword research and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Client call participation and feedback implementation](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [CM mentoring and skill gap support](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Content calendar management and performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

### Tips for Success at GrowthX.ai

  - [Proactively identify and solve problems (e.g., Vivek's Looker dashboard)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Maintain high content quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Exercise agency in suggesting improvements and solutions](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Customize workflows with CMs to fit your style](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Develop strong client relationships as a trusted advisor](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Communicate issues, especially with content production workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Company Culture and Growth

  - [Fast-paced startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Continuous improvement in tools and processes (e.g., Aerofs → Atlas)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Leadership trusts MEs to execute and innovate on content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
  - [Company culture still developing beyond work focus](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Will to continue onboarding and absorb information from various team members](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Potential placement on Strategy Sprint team (to be confirmed)](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=1107.0)
  - [Will to maintain proactive approach in identifying areas for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Aida available for any follow-up questions or support as needed](https://fathom.video/share/zRQtUYBGDzf3ysx5rvx_DvuWUgMyjLLF?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
